Driver implementations for AS3701B, MAX14690, and nPM1300 PMICs with power management and I2C functions.


## Files
- **[as3701b.c](as3701b.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the AS3701B PMIC, including functions for power management, GPIO control, and charging configuration.
- **[max14690_pmic.c](max14690_pmic.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the MAX14690 PMIC, including power rail management, I2C communication, and interrupt handling.
- **[npm1300.c](npm1300.c.md)**: Implements power management and battery monitoring for the nPM1300, including I2C communication and interrupt handling.
